positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a luminous celestial creature, perhaps a winged otter or a nebula fox, flowing through a stylized forest of glowing bioluminescent flora. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, featuring a clean silhouette against a deep, gradient midnight blue and ethereal cyan background. Use a neo-art deco style with thick, crisp line work and flat, rich color fields. High contrast lighting emphasizing the creature's golden glow and the flora's inner luminescence. Perfect for an apparel print, vector art aesthetic, minimal grain, no photorealism. --ar 1:1
